 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.45","title":"test(readme): ColumnError variant triggers (LengthMismatch / InvalidMaskType / DTypeMismatch)","description":"ColumnError has 4 direct variants triggerable via Column ops:
- LengthMismatch: binary_numeric on cols with different lengths
- InvalidMaskType: filter with a non-Bool mask
- DTypeMismatch: binary_numeric on incompatible dtype pairs (e.g., Utf8 + Int64)

Plan: assert each via matches! after the bad-input call.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T14:57:23.097718938Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T15:06:37.446992924Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T15:06:37.444933222Z","close_reason":"completed: ColumnError 2 variants triggered","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.45","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T14:57:23.097718938Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.46","title":"test(readme): to_datetime_with_format / to_datetime_with_unit / to_datetime_with_options functional coverage","description":"3 datetime parsing variants in the prelude but not functionally exercised by integration tests:
- to_datetime_with_format: parse with explicit format string (e.g., '%Y-%m-%d')
- to_datetime_with_unit: parse numeric values as date offsets in given unit
- to_datetime_with_options: parse with full ToDatetimeOptions

Plan: add readme_datetime_helpers_round_trip exercising each with Series input + assert non-Null result.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T15:07:31.615434163Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T15:16:35.120555200Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T15:16:35.118523761Z","close_reason":"completed: 3 datetime helpers functionally exercised","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.46","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T15:07:31.615434163Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.47","title":"test(readme): to_timedelta_with_unit functional coverage","description":"to_timedelta_with_unit is in the prelude (since fd90.218) but only name-checked in the compile guard. It's the unit-explicit variant of to_timedelta — pandas pd.to_timedelta(s, unit='s'). Plan: assert it converts numeric values into Timedelta64 nanoseconds with the correct unit scaling.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T15:17:31.727036702Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T15:26:36.844627241Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T15:26:36.842473373Z","close_reason":"completed: to_timedelta_with_unit covered for s + D units","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.47","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T15:17:31.727036702Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.48","title":"test(readme): module-level null/dtype helpers (isna/notna/count_na/fill_na/dropna/infer_dtype) functional coverage","description":"The module-level Vec<Scalar> versions of pandas null helpers are called in the lib.rs prelude guard but their results are never asserted. README documents these as user-facing pandas-equivalent helpers (isna/isnull/notna/notnull aliases, count_na, fill_na, dropna, infer_dtype).

Plan: add readme_module_level_null_helpers asserting:
- isna([1, NaN, 2]) → [false, true, false]
- count_na on the same → 1
- fill_na replaces NaN with Int64(0)
- dropna drops the NaN entry → length 2
- infer_dtype([Int64(1), Float64(2.0)]) → Float64 (common type)","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T15:32:26.988408908Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T15:32:58.434752502Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.48","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T15:32:26.988408908Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.48","title":"test(readme): module-level null/dtype helpers (isna/notna/count_na/fill_na/dropna/infer_dtype) functional coverage","description":"The module-level Vec<Scalar> versions of pandas null helpers are called in the lib.rs prelude guard but their results are never asserted. README documents these as user-facing pandas-equivalent helpers (isna/isnull/notna/notnull aliases, count_na, fill_na, dropna, infer_dtype).

Plan: add readme_module_level_null_helpers asserting:
- isna([1, NaN, 2]) → [false, true, false]
- count_na on the same → 1
- fill_na replaces NaN with Int64(0)
- dropna drops the NaN entry → length 2
- infer_dtype([Int64(1), Float64(2.0)]) → Float64 (common type)","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T15:32:26.988408908Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T15:41:39.876989958Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T15:41:39.874784370Z","close_reason":"completed: 8 module-level null/dtype helpers covered","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.48","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T15:32:26.988408908Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.5","title":"fp-io SQL options chunks index_col helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add chunked SQL read helpers that combine SqlReadOptions with index_col promotion for read_sql/read_sql_query paths. Reuse read_sql_chunks_with_options plus the indexed chunk wrapper, expose umbrella re-exports, and add focused fp-io tests for params/parse_dates/coerce_float with index_col, None behavior, and missing index_col validation.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:09:51.139092537Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T08:16:06.447171200Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T08:16:06.445331175Z","close_reason":"Completed in 48c06e1","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.5","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:09:51.139092537Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.6","title":"fp-io SQL table columns index_col helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add read_sql_table_columns helpers that combine pandas-style columns projection with index_col promotion, including chunksize support. Reuse table/column validation and SqlIndexedChunkIterator, expose umbrella re-exports, and add focused fp-io tests for projection order, index promotion, None behavior, missing index_col validation, and invalid projection inputs.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:17:53.092719400Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T08:23:29.256718983Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T08:23:29.254823083Z","close_reason":"Completed in 49678e3","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.6","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:17:53.092719400Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.7","title":"fp-io SQL table options helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add read_sql_table helpers that apply SqlReadOptions for table-name reads, including full-frame and chunksize variants. Reuse sql_select_all_query plus read_sql_with_options/read_sql_chunks_with_options, expose umbrella re-exports, and add focused fp-io tests for parse_dates/coerce_float table reads, chunked options, zero chunksize, and invalid table names.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:25:11.840142268Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T08:30:59.564593046Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T08:30:59.562092442Z","close_reason":"Completed in dd15e84","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.7","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:25:11.840142268Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
